backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the Hero section phone number text color was changed to white, with high confidence, referencing Hero.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of each frontend source file describing key styling and structural changes made across the app's components.
frontend/index.css: Defines Tailwind base layer with OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, primary, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the full single-page layout with Navigation, Hero, Services, About, Contact, and Footer sections.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section displaying company story, a founder blockquote, trust badges (Background Checked, 20+ Yrs Experience), and a highlights grid with icons.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section with a free quote CTA via email, phone link, and contact info cards for phone, email, service area, and hours.
frontend/src/components/CustomizationPro: Empty file — the CustomizationPrompt component has been removed with no content remaining.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Multi-column footer with brand info, contact details, quick links, services list, and business hours, all using dark ink tokens on a light background.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with headline, tagline, a free quote CTA button, and a phone number link styled with white text and white border to match the overlay background.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive fixed navigation bar with smooth-scroll links, a mobile hamburger menu, and a 'Get a Quote' CTA button that scrolls to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Displays a grid of 8 handyman service cards (plumbing, electrical, carpentry, etc.) with icons, descriptions, and a service-area banner for Philadelphia to New Jersey.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, login, and logout via AuthClient.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Oswald and Inter fonts, defining Tailwind base/component/utility layers, CSS custom properties for the design system (orange, ink, snow palette), and utility classes like section-title.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom fonts (Oswald/Inter), an orange/ink/snow color palette using oklch values, custom shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking version, existing features, and the current task: changing the Hero section phone number text color to white.
